scripts.spring:build: cd backend/auth-service && mvn package && cd ../api-gateway && mvn package && cd ../resource-service && mvn package && cd ../profile-service && mvn package && cd ../community-service && mvn package && cd ../notification-service && mvn package
scripts.daemon:build:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force bin | Out-Null; Set-Location backend/node-daemon; go build -o ../../bin/beiming-daemon.exe ."
scripts.daemon:build:linux: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:GOOS='linux'; $env:GOARCH='amd64'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force bin | Out-Null; Set-Location backend/node-daemon; go build -o ../../bin/beiming-daemon-linux-amd64 ."
scripts.downloader:build:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force bin,public/downloads | Out-Null; Set-Location backend/local-downloader; go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w -buildid= -H=windowsgui' -o ../../bin/beiming-local-downloader.exe .; Copy-Item ../../bin/beiming-local-downloader.exe ../../public/downloads/beiming-local-downloader.exe -Force"
scripts.db:up: wsl -u root sh -lc "cd /mnt/c/Users/ragingbull/beiming && docker compose up -d postgres"
scripts.db:down: wsl -u root sh -lc "cd /mnt/c/Users/ragingbull/beiming && docker compose down"
